embeddingText: Konstnärligt skapande och scenkonst, portfolio, verk, föreställningar, utställningar, produktioner, roller, scenbilder, press, recensioner, stipendier, aktuella datum, bokning, kontakt.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold when the business primarily presents artistic works, performances, productions or a creative practice.
Prefer this scaffold for solo artists, ensembles, theatre groups, dancers, musicians, performers and exhibition-focused creators.
A dedicated works or portfolio page is central; services should not be the primary information architecture.
Optional aktuellt route fits recurring public dates, while optional press route fits media-facing material.
